title: nepeta amethystina subsp. boissieri
intro: Nepeta amethystina subsp. boissieri, also known as Boissier's catmint, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Nepeta amethystina subsp. boissieri include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing with carrier oils for external use.
